comment: Incredibly rich and perfectly executed recipe. The beef was tender and the pastry stayed crisp. Worth every minute of effort.
doTips: Let the beef rest completely before wrapping
Seal the layers tightly to avoid leaks
dontTips: Don't overcook the beef during searing

comment: Amazing dish for a special occasion. The flavor combination is excellent, but it requires patience and precision.
doTips: Use mushrooms cooked until completely dry

comment: Great recipe but definitely not beginner-friendly. My pastry slightly overbrowned, but taste was still excellent.
doTips: Use foil if the pastry browns too quickly
dontTips: Don't leave it unattended in the oven
Don't skip egg wash for shine

doTips: let it cool down a bit

comment: Really authentic taste, very close to what I had in Naples. Dough texture was perfect after resting overnight.
doTips: Let the dough ferment for at least 12 hours
Use high hydration dough for better crust

comment: Very good recipe overall, but I found it slightly tricky to get the crust right in a home oven.
doTips: Preheat oven at maximum temperature for at least 30 minutes
Use a pizza stone if possible
dontTips: Don't use cold dough straight from the fridge
